title: Just Vanilla
description: A modpack designed with vanilla in mind, while adding an overhaul to world generation!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d1ff8d28a577cebce14a0603448124f61209ec4_0.webp)
# Just Vanilla
Just Vanilla is a Vanilla-like Modpack designed to not add any new blocks or items and just focus on performance, qol and world generation. This modpack will overhaul world generation so you won't ever feel bored again! The Modpack comes with many QOL mods like CustomHUD, Freecam or EssentialGUI.

![Warning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/970c6b759f0b3d738e930224cc681ce04f5e73ad.png)
